prompts.name: Prompt: Project Goal Clarification
prompts.outputFormat: Structured Markdown with headings and bullets
acceptanceCriteria: Output is complete and addresses node goal
Terminology aligns with project objective
prompts.content:
# Role
AI Strategy Copilot

# Objective
Complete Project Goal Clarification for AI SaaS MVP delivery

# Context Required
- Business objective

# Input Materials
- Context Pack
- Upstream artifacts

# Output Format
Structured Markdown with headings and bullets

# Constraints
- Follow boundary rules
- Escalate ambiguity

# Acceptance Criteria
- Output is complete and addresses node goal
- Terminology aligns with project objective

# Failure Handling
- Report blockers
- Request human review
